title: Dino dance pack
description: Dino saw the bridge, dino happy, dino dance!
body:
# Dino dance pack

dino dance pack is an all in one for most of the greatest create and its addons and rpg with some minor tweaks, and use sinytra to bridge some content mods and utility mods, and well optimized, destroy the loaders chain!

# feature
Speaking of the feature, me personaly is a heavy create fan, and beautiful community have made so many addons including [Create: Steam n Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails), [Create Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry), [Create new age](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-new-age) and so many more, combine with [Storagedrawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/storagedrawers) with [Ae2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) we can build the most unique and perfect storage system.
![Multiplayer with create mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3bZGMxNC/images/c397bde48914310dc4554ce6933b380ef6eeceb3.png)

And therefore, the pack also included a lot of new dimension mods, especially [The aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether), [Blue skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies) and [Ad astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), different dimension, different world, go conquer them!

# the bridge - sinytra connector
Big shoutout to [Sinytra team](https://modrinth.com/organization/sinytra), the pack bridged a lot of fabric-only mod that is also amazing, with [c2me](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) the world loading speed will be so much faster and more stable that prevent server lag, and also having [Betternether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) and [Betterend](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) working on neoforge loader perfectly (wow) so we can enjoy the coolest nether and end dimension
![betterend](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3bZGMxNC/images/d2db593d0d61c7ebda0cab0f16a8a0a89c53080a.png)
![betternether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3bZGMxNC/images/3053b1c139eee09ed4d020fbb7d2090efffc6d5c.png)

# Shaders compatiblity
You would probably facing two problems while using shaders: some text bar radomly becomes transparent and random crash, to solve those issues pleass follow these steps:
1. Go to `<yourinstance>/config/immediatelyfast.json` and turn off `font_atlas_resizing`, this can fix random text transparency
2. Edit Brute force Rendering Culling and turn off cull chunk option (you can edit them in ingame menu or the same steps above), this should fix random crash while using shaders
(If you are not using shaders these setup are no needed)

## credits
Some of the mods that are currently not published on the platform but they are awesome that helps the modpack to be more consistent

- [fresh compats](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-compats-emf)
- [super better grass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass)
